title: Echo Performance
description: A mod pack to give you the highest possible performance and optifine's feathers.
body:
# 💠 Echo Performance  
**The balance between performance and visual quality.**

---

## 🌟 Introduction
**Echo Performance** is an optimization-focused Minecraft modpack designed to deliver a smoother, faster, and more refined experience.  
It focuses on boosting performance and stability while bringing back some of the **OptiFine-like features**, including:

- 🔍 **Zoom functionality**  
- 🧱 **Custom Entity & Item Textures/Models (CEM/CIT)**  
- 💡 **Shader and Connected Textures support**  
- 🎶 **Polytone features** — enhancing ambience, lighting transitions, and sound effects for a more dynamic world  
- 🌌 **Custom sky Textures**

With carefully tuned configs and lightweight mods, Echo Performance ensures a **fluid gameplay experience** without sacrificing beauty or immersion.

---

## ⚙️ Why Echo Performance?
Echo Performance is designed for players who want to **move to Fabric** or simply achieve **higher FPS** while keeping the familiar **OptiFine experience** they love.  

This modpack:
- Keeps **vanilla gameplay and world behavior** intact  
- Works seamlessly with **any world or multiplayer server**  
- Requires no extra setup — just install and play  

In short:  
> **Fabric freedom, OptiFine familiarity.**

---

## 💬 Issues or Questions
If you run into any problems, bugs, or need help, feel free to join the [**official Discord server**](https://discord.gg/PRCMKWR9bH) to ask questions or report issues.  
The community is always ready to assist you.

---

💠 *Echo Performance — for those who want beauty, speed, and simplicity in one modpack.*

----

### Credits

Some configurations in this modpack are based on the [**Simply Optimized**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) approach.
